name: MoneyGram
description_short: Daly City, CA MoneyGram at 135 Pierce St provides money transfers, bill payments, and check cashing with extended hours.
description_long:
MoneyGram in Daly City, CA is located at 135 Pierce St as a standalone check-cashing store. The location is open Monday through Saturday from 7AM to 10PM and Sundays from 7AM to 8PM, providing extended weekday and weekend hours for Daly City residents. This branch handles money transfers, bill payments, and check cashing with reliable, quick service.

The Daly City MoneyGram offers domestic and international money transfers, bill payment services, and check cashing. Call +1 800-746-7287 to inquire about specific transfer destinations, fees, rates, and service options. The team at this Daly City location can assist with any questions about how to use their services.

Daly City residents visiting this MoneyGram should bring a valid government-issued ID and be prepared to provide recipient information for transfers. The early opening at 7AM and extended Sunday hours until 8PM make it accessible for various schedules. MoneyGram is a trusted option for quick money transfers and check cashing needs.
pros: Multiple convenient locations in single neighborhoods (3 locations in Daly City alone)
Extended hours with some locations open until 10:00 PM
Hybrid access model allowing both online and offline transaction management
Partnerships with familiar major retailers (CVS, Lucky) integrated into shopping routines
Quick service enabling same-day money transfers
Serves unbanked and underbanked populations without requiring traditional bank accounts
cons: MoneyGram services typically charge transaction fees that can be substantial, particularly for international transfers
Limited financial services scope—does not offer credit products, savings accounts, or lending
Dependent on retail partner hours and locations, creating accessibility gaps in some areas
Dependent on third-party retail partners' business decisions; locations may close without notice
No credit-building opportunities, making it unsuitable for customers wanting to establish credit history
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who need immediate cash access without a bank account
Customers sending domestic or international remittances to family or friends
People needing quick check cashing services during extended retail hours
Consumers requiring bill payment or money order services outside traditional banking hours
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate cash access, money transfers, or check cashing services through convenient retail locations. The main caveat is that services carry fees and provide no credit-building benefits, making them suitable only for immediate financial needs rather than long-term financial improvement strategies.
services: In-person transaction processing at retail locations
meta_description: MoneyGram at 135 Pierce St, Daly City, CA. Money transfers, bill payments, and check cashing with extended hours.
